name: Ramp
philosophy: Modernist B2B fintech with editorial weight — white canvas, signal red voltage, geometric serif display at hero scale, dashboard mockup as the marketing artifact.

design_language.motion_signature: 180ms ease-out hover; signature 600ms tabular-figure count-up on savings numbers; 400ms scale-from-98% fade on dashboard mockup scroll-reveal.

trademark_signals: Signal red as the only brand voltage — no second accent except savings-green
Geometric serif (GT Sectra) at hero scale — editorial weight
Savings dollar amounts in display-size serif numerals — money as type, not chart
Dashboard mockups are full product chrome, never abstract
Customer quotes as editorial pull-quotes with large serif
ai_slop_avoided: Don't render 3D card geometry or floating chrome
